test.name: TC003-Add Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket To Cart

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Add Product To Cart
Convert Product Name To Slug
Convert To Lower Case
kw.doc: Converts string to lower case.

kw.name: Replace String
kw.doc: Replaces ``search_for`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.
Convert "Sauce Labs Backpack" -> "sauce-labs-backpack"

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
Click Add to Cart for a named product

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Is
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL is ``expected``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.msg: Verifying element 'xpath=//span[@class='title']' contains exact text 'Your Cart'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Cart Should Contain Product
Get WebElements
kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.msg: Cart does not contain 'Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket'. Cart has: ['Sauce Labs Backpack']: '['Sauce Labs Backpack']' does not contain 'Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket'
kw.arg: msg=Cart does not contain '${product_name}'. Cart has: ${names}
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
kw.status: Cart does not contain 'Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket'. Cart has: ['Sauce Labs Backpack']: '['Sauce Labs Backpack']' does not contain 'Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket'
Cart does not contain 'Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket'. Cart has: ['Sauce Labs Backpack']: '['Sauce Labs Backpack']' does not contain 'Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket'

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.status: Cart does not contain 'Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket'. Cart has: ['Sauce Labs Backpack']: '['Sauce Labs Backpack']' does not contain 'Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket'

test.name: TC004-Add Multiple Products Accumulates Badge Count

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.msg: Cart does not contain 'Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket'. Cart has: ['Sauce Labs Backpack', 'Sauce Labs Bike Light', 'Sauce Labs Bolt T-Shirt']: '['Sauce Labs Backpack', 'Sauce Labs Bike Light', 'Sauce Labs Bolt T-Shirt']' does not contain 'Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket'

kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
